import boto3
from redis import Redis


class OrderHandler:
    def __init__(self, db: "DatabaseConnection", cache: Redis, s3, queue):
        self._db = db
        self._cache = cache
        self._s3 = s3
        self._queue = queue

    def handle_event(self, event: dict) -> dict:
        order = self._db.fetch(event["order_id"])
        cached = self._cache.get(f"order:{order['id']}")
        if cached:
            return cached
        result = process_order(order)
        self._cache.set(f"order:{order['id']}", result)
        return result


def build_handler() -> OrderHandler:
    db = DatabaseConnection("postgresql://localhost/orders")
    cache = Redis(host="localhost", port=6379)
    s3 = boto3.client("s3")
    queue = SQSClient("order-queue")
    return OrderHandler(db, cache, s3, queue)


handler = build_handler()


def handle_order_event(event: dict) -> dict:
    return handler.handle_event(event)
